description: Configure and run the 'DataProcessor' Java application in IntelliJ IDEA. Create an 'Application' Run Configuration named 'ProcessIrisData' with the main class 'com.dataproc.App', VM options '-Xmx512m -Doutput.format=json -Dfilter.species=virginica -Dfilter.min.petal.length=5.0', program arguments 'data/iris.csv', and environment variables 'OUTPUT_DIR=/home/ga/output' and 'LOG_LEVEL=INFO'. Execute the configuration to generate the output file.
